customManagers.description: Centralized JS/TS dep registry — pinned block in dependencies/versions.json is the source of truth. Renovate updates this file directly; `npx syncpack fix-mismatches` then propagates the bump to each package.json.
Native-toolchain pins in sdk/runanywhere-commons/VERSIONS (shell KEY=VALUE). Renovate hits the file via per-key annotation comments like `# renovate: datasource=github-tags depName=foo/bar`.
